subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Sacred Threshold! Thy detailed letter was received and, despite lack of time, was studied with the utmost care [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مبارک نامه مفصل شما رسید با وجود عدم فرصت با نهایت دقت مطالعه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @interpretation of dreams and visions
